steps.title: Cancel $y$ by adding
steps.content: The equations contain $4y$ and $-4y$, so add them: $$(4y)+(-4y)=(6x+19)+(9x-27).$$

steps.title: Solve only for $45x$
steps.content: This gives $0=15x-8$, so $15x=8$. The question asks for $45x$, which is $3$ times $15x$: $$45x=3(8)=24.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D, $24$, is correct. Choice C, $8$, is the value of $15x$; choice B, $-8$, comes from using the wrong sign; and choice A, $-24$, is the opposite of the requested value.
